summary.intent: Fix a compilation error in the moltis Rust project after a rand crate upgrade, then commit and push the fix.
summary.outcome: Fixed the rand 0.10 API breakage in otp.rs by importing RngExt instead of Rng, compiled successfully, and pushed the fix to main.

repo: moltis is a Rust workspace located at /Users/penso/tmp/molt/moltis with a crates/channels subcrate containing OTP logic

code.finding: rand 0.10 moved random_range from Rng to RngExt — import must be `use rand::RngExt` not `use rand::Rng`
OTP code generation uses rand::rng().random_range(100_000..1_000_000) to produce a 6-digit code

workflow: rand 0.10 is a breaking upgrade: random_range moved to RngExt trait, requiring an explicit import change

friction: rand 0.10 breaking change caused a compile error — random_range silently moved to a new trait (RngExt) without being removed from the method resolution path, making the error non-obvious until reading the compiler hint
